meta.load_condition: Load when user intent includes a concrete production situation, implementation target, failure symptom, or review request.

scenes.name: User gives a vague animation request like 'animate this landing page' or 'make it feel premium.'
scenes.trigger_signal: User gives a vague animation request like 'animate this landing page' or 'make it feel premium.'

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: User gives a vague animation request like 'animate this landing page' or 'make it feel premium.'

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Stop and generate a brief. Ask clarifying questions about audience, attention path, and emotional tone. Do not write code until the brief is approved.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.

scenes.name: Agent-generated animation looks busy, cheap, or AI-like.
scenes.trigger_signal: Agent-generated animation looks busy, cheap, or AI-like.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: Agent-generated animation looks busy, cheap, or AI-like.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Check if the agent skipped the brief step. Reduce moving groups, add holds, slow easing, and remove decorative effects. Re-review against motion_design_master criteria.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.

scenes.name: User wants to iterate on agent-generated animation.
scenes.trigger_signal: User wants to iterate on agent-generated animation.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: User wants to iterate on agent-generated animation.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Show the current animation. Ask the human to mark each beat: keep / adjust / replace. Apply changes and show a revision delta listing what changed and why.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.

scenes.name: Team wants to establish an AI-assisted animation pipeline.
scenes.trigger_signal: Team wants to establish an AI-assisted animation pipeline.

sub_scenarios.trap_belief: Team wants to establish an AI-assisted animation pipeline.

three_questions.belief: What does the user believe is the problem?
three_questions.state: What is the actual state of the animation?
three_questions.need: What structural change does the animation need?

action_template: Define the brief template, assumption log format, review gate checkpoints, and quality criteria. Document the workflow. Run a pilot with one animation before scaling.
sub_scenarios.expected_result: Animation quality improves according to measurable indicators.
